name: ones-skills
description: Agent skills by @gceico for Claude Code.

plugins.name: tool-box
plugins.description: Bundles three agent skills: challenger (adversarial stress-tester for technical decisions, designs, and specs), skill-forge (turns repeated manual workflows into reusable, validated Agent Skills), and autopilot (owns a task end-to-end under a frozen contract, bounded build loop, and independent verification gate).

plugins.name: linkedin-ops
plugins.description: White-label LinkedIn ops loop: scout (swipe file), ideate (blue-ocean ideas), research (trends), analyze (your own stats), connect (harvest leads into a pipeline), outreach (pre-approved, stop-on-reply message sequence). Local .md/.csv files only; depends on the last30days plugin for cross-platform research.
